message.content:
@startuml
participant ScooterOwner as ScooterOwner
participant Dashboard as Dashboard
participant BikeService as BikeService
participant ClaimsService as ClaimsService
participant bike as bike
participant Claim as Claim

ScooterOwner ..> Dashboard : lockBike

Dashboard ..> BikeService : lockBike(bike)

BikeService ..> bike : lockBike(bike)

bike ..<-- BikeService : bike

Dashboard ..<-- BikeService : bike

ScooterOwner ..> Dashboard : unlockBike

Dashboard ..> BikeService : unlockBike(bike)

BikeService ..> bike : unlockBike(bike)

bike ..<-- BikeService : bike

Dashboard ..<-- BikeService : bike

ScooterOwner ..> Dashboard : bike
@enduml
